description: A buyer is interested in a property but the seller's disclosure statement is not attached to the MLS listing.

nodes.task_description: Identify the listing agent for the property from the MLS.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the name and contact email for the listing agent.

nodes.task_description: Draft and send an email to the listing agent formally requesting a copy of the Seller's Disclosure.

expected_outcome.expected: A professional request email is sent.

nodes.task_description: Once received, forward the disclosure document to the buyer client for their review.

expected_outcome.expected: The document is promptly sent to the client.
